entry_options.label: E1
entry_options.name: Proximal
entry_options.note: Limit at proximal. Always fills, deeper drawdown possible.

entry_options.label: E2
entry_options.name: Zone (midpoint)
entry_options.note: Limit at 50% of zone. Better R:R, may not fill on shallow retraces.

entry_options.label: E3
entry_options.name: Confirmation (PatternType.HAMMER)
entry_options.note: Wait for candlestick confirmation in zone. Highest confidence.

roadmap.note: Auto-generated from seasonality + presidential + sannial + COT. Override via user dashboard for bespoke calls.
